ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the game */,
  "current_version" TEXT /* Current version of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating for the game */,
  "esrb_rating" TEXT /* ESRB rating for the game */,
  "language_support" TEXT /* Languages supported by the game */,
  "dlc_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloadable content (DLC) available for the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update or patch */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's official website */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the publisher was established */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees or company size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the developer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the developer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the developer's official website */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the developer was established */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees or company size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the genre is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the platform is currently active */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system required for the platform */,
  "minimum_requirements" TEXT /* Minimum system requirements for the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the sale */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., completed, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user score */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "user_score" TEXT /* User score for the game */,
  "meta_score" TEXT /* Meta score for the game */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user review */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_owners" INTEGER /* Total number of owners */,
  "median_owners" INTEGER /* Median number of owners */,
  "standard_deviation_owners" INTEGER /* Standard deviation of owners */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the owner data was last updated */,
  "active_owners" INTEGER /* Number of active owners (e.g., those who have played the game recently) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_owners_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players */,
  "median_players" INTEGER /* Median number of players */,
  "standard_deviation_players" INTEGER /* Standard deviation of players */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the player data was last updated */,
  "active_players" INTEGER /* Number of active players (e.g., those who have played the game recently) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playtime" (
  "playtime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playtime record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "median_playtime" TEXT /* Median playtime in hours */,
  "standard_deviation_playtime" TEXT /* Standard deviation of playtime in hours */,
  "average_playtime" TEXT /* Average playtime of players */,
  "total_playtime" TEXT /* Total playtime of all players */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playtime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playtime_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, purchase) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the game */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the game (e.g., PC, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., email, social media) */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the campaign received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotional_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional code */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "code_value" TEXT /* Value of the promotional code */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage applied by the code */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date the code becomes valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date the code expires */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the code can be used */,
  "redemption_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the code has been redeemed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the code is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotional_codes_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_promotions" (
  "user_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user promotion record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotional code */,
  "used_date" TEXT /* Date the code was used */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the purchase */,
  "redemption_method" TEXT /* Method of redemption (e.g., online, in-game) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_promotions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_promotions_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES promotional_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "is_patch" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is a patch */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Detailed patch notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
